nasb.text: Now Jacob saw that there was grain in Egypt, and Jacob said to his sons, “Why are you staring at one another?”

esv.text: When Jacob learned that there was grain for sale in Egypt, he said to his sons, “Why do you look at one another?”

cnv.text: 雅各見埃及有糧食，就對兒子們說：“你們為甚麼彼此對望呢？”

ccb.text: 雅各知道埃及有粮食，就对儿子们说：“你们为什么还在这儿互相观望呢？

csbs.text: 雅各见埃及有粮，就对儿子们说：“你们为什么彼此干瞪眼呢？”
